description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-radio-group. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-radio** (`hx-radio-group/hx-radio.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-radio-group AND hx-radio. Verify ARIA roles (radiogroup/radio pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys for group navigation, Space to select), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-radio API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/` (includes hx-radio.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-radio-group.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-radio-group

descriptionHistory.description: Launch readiness audit for hx-radio-group. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, radiogroup role, arrow key roving tabindex, WCAG 2.1 AA. C-PATTERN-01: @query uses ! not = null. C-PATTERN-03: use role=radiogroup (supports aria-required) not bare fieldset. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-radio-group.md`

Launch readiness audit for hx-radio-group. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-radio** (`hx-radio-group/hx-radio.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-radio-group AND hx-radio. Verify ARIA roles (radiogroup/radio pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys for group navigation, Space to select), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-radio API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/` (includes hx-radio.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-radio-group.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)

- `npm run verify` passes
